- content:

```
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using BepInEx;
using BepInEx.Logging;
using HarmonyLib;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace StationpediaPlusScriptEngine
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Standalone ScriptEngine loader for StationpediaPlus.
    /// This is a separate DLL with NO StationeersMods.Interface dependency,
    /// so it can be loaded by ScriptEngine even when SLP isn't present.
    /// </summary>
    [BepInPlugin("com.stationpediaplus.scriptengine", "StationpediaPlus_ScriptEngine", "1.0.0")]
    public class ScriptEngineLoader : BaseUnityPlugin
    {
        public const string HarmonyId = "com.stationpediaplus.scriptengine";
        
        // Description databases
        public static Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions> DeviceDatabase { get; private set; }
        public static GenericDescriptionsData GenericDescriptions { get; private set; }
        
        // Tooltip display state
        public static string CurrentTooltipText { get; set; } = "";
        public static bool ShowTooltip { get; set; } = false;
        
        // GUI styling
        private GUIStyle _tooltipStyle;
        private bool _stylesInitialized = false;
        private Texture2D _tooltipBackground;
        
        // Harmony instance
        private Harmony _harmony;
        
        // Page tracking
        private string _lastPageKey = "";
        private bool _stationpediaFound = false;
        
        // Track created components for cleanup
        internal static List<Component> _addedComponents = new List<Component>();
        internal static List<GameObject> _createdGameObjects = new List<GameObject>();
        
        void Awake()
        {
            Logger.LogInfo("========================================");
            Logger.LogInfo("=== StationpediaPlus ScriptEngine Loader ===");
            Logger.LogInfo("========================================");
            
            try
            {
                LoadDescriptions();
                ApplyHarmonyPatches();
                
                // Regenerate Stationpedia if already loaded
                if (Stationpedia.Instance != null)
                {
                    Logger.LogInfo("Regenerating Stationpedia...");
                    Stationpedia.Regenerate();
                    Logger.LogInfo("Stationpedia regenerated!");
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Reloaded via ScriptEngine!");
                }
                
                // Start monitoring coroutine
                StartCoroutine(MonitorStationpedia());
                
                Logger.LogInfo("Initialization complete!");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.LogError($"Initialization failed: {ex}");
            }
        }
        
        private void LoadDescriptions()
        {
            DeviceDatabase = new Dictionary<string, DeviceDescriptions>();
            GenericDescriptions = new GenericDescriptionsData();
            
            try
            {
                string modPath = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
                string jsonPath = Path.Combine(modPath, "descriptions.json");
                
                Logger.LogInfo($"Looking for descriptions at: {jsonPath}");
                
                if (File.Exists(jsonPath))
                {
                    string json = File.ReadAllText(jsonPath);
                    var data = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DescriptionsRoot>(json);
                    
                    if (data?.devices != null)
                    {
                        foreach (var device in data.devices)
                        {
                            DeviceDatabase[device.deviceKey] = device;
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (data?.genericDescriptions != null)
                    {
                        GenericDescriptions = data.genericDescriptions;
                    }
                    
                    Logger.LogInfo($"Loaded {DeviceDatabase.Count} device descriptions");
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Loaded {DeviceDatabase.Count} devices");
                }
                else
                {
                    Logger.LogWarning($"descriptions.json not found at {jsonPath}");
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.LogError($"Error loading descriptions: {ex}");
            }
        }
        
        private void ApplyHarmonyPatches()
        {
            try
            {
                _harmony = new Harmony(HarmonyId);
                
                var universalPageType = typeof(Assets.Scripts.UI.UniversalPage);
                
                // Patch PopulateLogicSlotInserts
                var populateLogicSlotInserts = universalPageType.GetMethod("PopulateLogicSlotInserts", 
                    BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Instance);
                if (populateLogicSlotInserts != null)
                {
                    var postfix = typeof(HarmonyPatches).GetMethod("PopulateLogicSlotInserts_Postfix", 
                        BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Static);
                    _harmony.Patch(populateLogicSlotInserts, postfix: new HarmonyMethod(postfix));
                    Logger.LogInfo("Patched PopulateLogicSlotInserts");
                }
                
                // Patch ChangeDisplay
                var changeDisplay = universalPageType.GetMethod("ChangeDisplay", 
                    BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Instance);
                if (changeDisplay != null)
                {
                    var postfix = typeof(HarmonyPatches).GetMethod("ChangeDisplay_Postfix", 
                        BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Static);
                    _harmony.Patch(changeDisplay, postfix: new HarmonyMethod(postfix));
                    Logger.LogInfo("Patched ChangeDisplay");
                }
                
                Logger.LogInfo("Harmony patches applied");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.LogError($"Error applying patches: {ex}");
            }
        }
        
        private IEnumerator MonitorStationpedia()
        {
            Logger.LogInfo("Monitor coroutine started");
            
            while (true)
            {
                yield return new WaitForSeconds(0.1f);
                
                try
                {
                    if (Stationpedia.Instance == null)
                        continue;

                    if (!_stationpediaFound)
                    {
                        _stationpediaFound = true;
                        Logger.LogInfo("Stationpedia.Instance found!");
                    }

                    if (!Stationpedia.Instance.gameObject.activeInHierarchy)
                    {
                        _lastPageKey = "";
                        continue;
                    }

                    string currentPageKey = Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey;
                    
                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentPageKey) && currentPageKey != _lastPageKey)
                    {
                        _lastPageKey = currentPageKey;
                        StartCoroutine(AddTooltipsAfterDelay(currentPageKey));
                    }
                }
                catch { }
            }
        }
        
        private IEnumerator AddTooltipsAfterDelay(string pageKey)
        {
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            yield return new WaitForEndOfFrame();
            AddTooltipsToLogicItems(pageKey);
        }
        
        private void AddTooltipsToLogicItems(string pageKey)
        {
            try
            {
                var universalPage = Stationpedia.Instance?.UniversalPageRef;
                if (universalPage == null) return;

                int total = 0;
                total += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicContents, pageKey, "Logic");
                total += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.LogicSlotContents, pageKey, "LogicSlot");
                total += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ModeContents, pageKey, "Mode");
                total += AddTooltipsToCategory(universalPage.ConnectionContents, pageKey, "Connection");

                if (total > 0)
                {
                    ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] Added {total} tooltips for {pageKey}");
                }
            }
            catch { }
        }
        
        private int AddTooltipsToCategory(StationpediaCategory category, string pageKey, string categoryName)
        {
            if (category == null || category.Contents == null) return 0;

            int added = 0;
            foreach (Transform child in category.Contents)
            {
                SPDALogic logic = child.GetComponent<SPDALogic>();
                if (logic != null && logic.InfoValue != null)
                {
                    var existing = logic.GetComponent<SELogicTooltip>();
                    if (existing == null)
                    {
                        string logicName = logic.InfoValue.text;
                        var tooltip = logic.gameObject.AddComponent<SELogicTooltip>();
                        tooltip.Initialize(pageKey, logicName, categoryName);
                        _addedComponents.Add(tooltip);
                        added++;
                    }
                }
            }
            return added;
        }
        
        private void InitializeStyles()
        {
            if (_stylesInitialized) return;
            
            _tooltipBackground = new Texture2D(1, 1);
            _tooltipBackground.SetPixel(0, 0, new Color(0.05f, 0.1f, 0.15f, 0.95f));
            _tooltipBackground.Apply();
            
            _tooltipStyle = new GUIStyle(GUI.skin.box);
            _tooltipStyle.normal.background = _tooltipBackground;
            _tooltipStyle.normal.textColor = Color.white;
            _tooltipStyle.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 8, 8);
            _tooltipStyle.wordWrap = true;
            _tooltipStyle.richText = true;
            _tooltipStyle.fontSize = 14;
            _tooltipStyle.alignment = TextAnchor.UpperLeft;
            
            _stylesInitialized = true;
        }
        
        void OnGUI()
        {
            try
            {
                if (!ShowTooltip || string.IsNullOrEmpty(CurrentTooltipText))
                    return;
                
                if (!_stylesInitialized)
                    InitializeStyles();
                
                Vector2 mousePos = Event.current.mousePosition;
                GUIContent content = new GUIContent(CurrentTooltipText);
                
                float maxWidth = 350f;
                Vector2 size = _tooltipStyle.CalcSize(content);
                if (size.x > maxWidth)
                {
                    size.x = maxWidth;
                    size.y = _tooltipStyle.CalcHeight(content, maxWidth);
                }
                
                size.x += 10;
                size.y += 10;
                
                float xPos = mousePos.x + 15;
                float yPos = mousePos.y + 15;
                
                if (xPos + size.x > Screen.width)
                    xPos = mousePos.x - size.x - 10;
                if (yPos + size.y > Screen.height)
                    yPos = mousePos.y - size.y - 10;
                
                xPos = Mathf.Max(5, xPos);
                yPos = Mathf.Max(5, yPos);
                
                Rect tooltipRect = new Rect(xPos, yPos, size.x, size.y);
                
                GUI.color = new Color(1f, 0.5f, 0f, 0.8f);
                GUI.Box(new Rect(tooltipRect.x - 2, tooltipRect.y - 2, tooltipRect.width + 4, tooltipRect.height + 4), "");
                GUI.color = Color.white;
                
                GUI.Box(tooltipRect, CurrentTooltipText, _tooltipStyle);
            }
            catch { }
        }
        
        void OnDestroy()
        {
            Logger.LogInfo("OnDestroy - cleaning up...");
            
            StopAllCoroutines();
            
            if (_harmony != null)
            {
                _harmony.UnpatchSelf();
                _harmony = null;
            }
            
            foreach (var c in _addedComponents)
            {
                if (c != null) try { Destroy(c); } catch { }
            }
            _addedComponents.Clear();
            
            foreach (var go in _createdGameObjects)
            {
                if (go != null) try { Destroy(go); } catch { }
            }
            _createdGameObjects.Clear();
            
            if (_tooltipBackground != null)
                Destroy(_tooltipBackground);
            
            ShowTooltip = false;
            CurrentTooltipText = "";
            DeviceDatabase = null;
            GenericDescriptions = null;
            
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Unloaded");
        }
        
        // Static helpers for tooltip lookup
        public static LogicDescription GetLogicDescription(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName)
        {
            string cleanName = CleanName(logicTypeName);
            
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.logicDescriptions != null && 
                    device.logicDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            if (GenericDescriptions?.logic != null && GenericDescriptions.logic.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new LogicDescription
                {
                    dataType = "Varies",
                    range = "Device-specific",
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }
        
        public static ModeDescription GetModeDescription(string deviceKey, string modeValue)
        {
            string cleanName = CleanName(modeValue);
            
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(deviceKey) && DeviceDatabase != null && 
                DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(deviceKey, out var device))
            {
                if (device.modeDescriptions != null && 
                    device.modeDescriptions.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
                {
                    return desc;
                }
            }
            
            if (GenericDescriptions?.modes != null && GenericDescriptions.modes.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new ModeDescription
                {
                    modeValue = cleanName,
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }
        
        public static LogicDescription GetConnectionDescription(string deviceKey, string connectionType)
        {
            string cleanName = CleanName(connectionType);
            
            if (GenericDescriptions?.connections != null && GenericDescriptions.connections.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var genericDesc))
            {
                return new LogicDescription
                {
                    dataType = "Connection",
                    range = "N/A",
                    description = genericDesc
                };
            }
            
            return null;
        }
        
        public static string GetSlotLogicDescription(string slotLogicType)
        {
            string cleanName = CleanName(slotLogicType);
            
            if (GenericDescriptions?.slots != null && GenericDescriptions.slots.TryGetValue(cleanName, out var desc))
            {
                return desc;
            }
            
            return null;
        }
        
        private static string CleanName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            return System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "").Trim();
        }
    }

    #region Data Classes
    
    [Serializable]
    public class DescriptionsRoot
    {
        public string version;
        public List<DeviceDescriptions> devices;
        public GenericDescriptionsData genericDescriptions;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class DeviceDescriptions
    {
        public string deviceKey;
        public string displayName;
        public Dictionary<string, LogicDescription> logicDescriptions;
        public Dictionary<string, ModeDescription> modeDescriptions;
        public Dictionary<string, SlotDescription> slotDescriptions;
        public Dictionary<string, VersionDescription> versionDescriptions;
        public Dictionary<string, MemoryDescription> memoryDescriptions;
        public List<SpecialBehavior> specialBehaviors;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class LogicDescription
    {
        public string dataType;
        public string range;
        public string description;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class ModeDescription
    {
        public string modeValue;
        public string description;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class SlotDescription
    {
        public string slotType;
        public string description;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class VersionDescription
    {
        public string description;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class MemoryDescription
    {
        public string opCode;
        public string parameters;
        public string description;
        public string byteLayout;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class SpecialBehavior
    {
        public string title;
        public string description;
    }

    [Serializable]
    public class GenericDescriptionsData
    {
        public Dictionary<string, string> logic;
        public Dictionary<string, string> slotTypes;
        public Dictionary<string, string> slots;
        public Dictionary<string, string> modes;
        public Dictionary<string, string> versions;
        public Dictionary<string, string> connections;
        public Dictionary<string, MemoryDescription> memory;
    }
    
    #endregion

    #region Tooltip Component

    public class SELogicTooltip : MonoBehaviour, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler
    {
        private string _deviceKey;
        private string _logicTypeName;
        private string _categoryName;
        private string _cachedTooltipText;
        private Coroutine _showCoroutine;
        private bool _isHovering;
        
        private const float HOVER_DELAY = 0.3f;

        public void Initialize(string deviceKey, string logicTypeName, string categoryName)
        {
            _deviceKey = deviceKey;
            _logicTypeName = logicTypeName;
            _categoryName = categoryName;
            _cachedTooltipText = null;
        }

        public void OnPointerEnter(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            _isHovering = true;
            if (_showCoroutine != null) StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
            _showCoroutine = StartCoroutine(ShowTooltipAfterDelay());
        }

        public void OnPointerExit(PointerEventData eventData)
        {
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            ScriptEngineLoader.ShowTooltip = false;
            ScriptEngineLoader.CurrentTooltipText = "";
        }

        private IEnumerator ShowTooltipAfterDelay()
        {
            yield return new WaitForSeconds(HOVER_DELAY);
            
            if (_isHovering)
            {
                string tooltipText = GetTooltipText();
                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(tooltipText))
                {
                    ScriptEngineLoader.CurrentTooltipText = tooltipText;
                    ScriptEngineLoader.ShowTooltip = true;
                }
            }
        }

        private string GetTooltipText()
        {
            if (_cachedTooltipText != null)
                return _cachedTooltipText;

            string cleanName = CleanName(_logicTypeName);
            
            if (_categoryName == "Mode")
            {
                var modeDesc = ScriptEngineLoader.GetModeDescription(_deviceKey, cleanName);
                if (modeDesc != null)
                {
                    _cachedTooltipText = $"<color=#9932CC><b>Mode: {cleanName}</b></color>\n" +
                                        $"<color=#888888>─────────────────────</color>\n" +
                                        $"{modeDesc.description}";
                    return _cachedTooltipText;
                }
            }
            else if (_categoryName == "Connection")
            {
                var connDesc = ScriptEngineLoader.GetConnectionDescription(_deviceKey, cleanName);
                if (connDesc != null)
                {
                    _cachedTooltipText = FormatTooltip(cleanName, connDesc);
                    return _cachedTooltipText;
                }
            }
            else if (_categoryName == "LogicSlot")
            {
                var slotLogicDesc = ScriptEngineLoader.GetSlotLogicDescription(cleanName);
                if (slotLogicDesc != null)
                {
                    _cachedTooltipText = $"<color=#FFA500><b>Slot: {cleanName}</b></color>\n" +
                                        $"<color=#888888>─────────────────────</color>\n" +
                                        $"<b>Type:</b> LogicSlot   <b>Slots:</b> All readable slots\n" +
                                        $"<color=#888888>─────────────────────</color>\n" +
                                        $"{slotLogicDesc}";
                    return _cachedTooltipText;
                }
            }
            
            var desc = ScriptEngineLoader.GetLogicDescription(_deviceKey, cleanName);
            if (desc != null)
            {
                _cachedTooltipText = FormatTooltip(cleanName, desc);
                return _cachedTooltipText;
            }
            
            _cachedTooltipText = $"<color=#FFA500><b>{cleanName}</b></color>\n\n" +
                                 $"<color=#AAAAAA>No description available.</color>";
            return _cachedTooltipText;
        }

        private string FormatTooltip(string cleanName, LogicDescription desc)
        {
            return $"<color=#FFA500><b>{cleanName}</b></color>\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>─────────────────────</color>\n" +
                   $"<b>Type:</b> {desc.dataType}   <b>Range:</b> {desc.range}\n" +
                   $"<color=#888888>─────────────────────</color>\n" +
                   $"{desc.description}";
        }

        private string CleanName(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return name;
            return System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.Replace(name, "<[^>]+>", "").Trim();
        }

        private void OnDisable()
        {
            _isHovering = false;
            if (_showCoroutine != null)
            {
                StopCoroutine(_showCoroutine);
                _showCoroutine = null;
            }
            ScriptEngineLoader.ShowTooltip = false;
            ScriptEngineLoader.CurrentTooltipText = "";
        }
    }

    #endregion

    #region Harmony Patches

    public static class HarmonyPatches
    {
        public static void PopulateLogicSlotInserts_Postfix(Assets.Scripts.UI.UniversalPage __instance)
        {
            try
            {
                var slotContents = __instance.LogicSlotContents;
                if (slotContents == null || slotContents.Contents == null) return;

                foreach (Transform child in slotContents.Contents)
                {
                    var spdalogic = child.GetComponent<Assets.Scripts.UI.SPDALogic>();
                    if (spdalogic == null || spdalogic.InfoReadWrite == null) continue;

                    string originalText = spdalogic.InfoReadWrite.text;
                    if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(originalText) || !originalText.Contains(",")) continue;
                    
                    // Check if it's a slot number list
                    bool isSlotList = true;
                    foreach (char c in originalText)
                    {
                        if (!char.IsDigit(c) && c != ',' && c != ' ')
                        {
                            isSlotList = false;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if (!isSlotList) continue;

                    string condensed = CondenseSlotNumbers(originalText);
                    if (condensed != originalText)
                    {
                        spdalogic.InfoReadWrite.text = condensed;
                    }
                }
            }
            catch { }
        }

        public static void ChangeDisplay_Postfix(Assets.Scripts.UI.UniversalPage __instance, StationpediaPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                string pageKey = page.Key;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(pageKey)) return;

                if (!ScriptEngineLoader.DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(pageKey, out var deviceDesc)) return;
                if (deviceDesc.specialBehaviors == null || deviceDesc.specialBehaviors.Count == 0) return;

                var categoryPrefab = Stationpedia.Instance.CategoryPrefab;
                if (categoryPrefab == null) return;

                StationpediaCategory category = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<StationpediaCategory>(
                    categoryPrefab, __instance.Content);
                category.Title.text = "Special Behaviors";

                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                foreach (var behavior in deviceDesc.specialBehaviors)
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"<color=#FFD700><b>{behavior.title}</b></color>");
                    sb.AppendLine(behavior.description);
                    sb.AppendLine();
                }

                var textGO = new UnityEngine.GameObject("SpecialBehaviorsText");
                textGO.transform.SetParent(category.Contents, false);
                ScriptEngineLoader._createdGameObjects.Add(textGO);
                
                var textComponent = textGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                textComponent.text = sb.ToString().TrimEnd();
                textComponent.fontSize = 16;
                textComponent.color = new UnityEngine.Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 0.8f, 1f);
                textComponent.enableWordWrapping = true;
                textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
                
                var rectTransform = textGO.GetComponent<UnityEngine.RectTransform>();
                rectTransform.anchorMin = new UnityEngine.Vector2(0, 1);
                rectTransform.anchorMax = new UnityEngine.Vector2(1, 1);
                rectTransform.pivot = new UnityEngine.Vector2(0.5f, 1);
                rectTransform.sizeDelta = new UnityEngine.Vector2(-20, 0);
                
                var textLayout = textGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                textLayout.preferredWidth = -1;
                textLayout.flexibleWidth = 1;
                
                var contentsLayout = category.Contents.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                if (contentsLayout == null)
                {
                    contentsLayout = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                    contentsLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                    contentsLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                    contentsLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                    contentsLayout.childControlHeight = true;
                    contentsLayout.spacing = 5;
                    contentsLayout.padding = new UnityEngine.RectOffset(10, 10, 5, 10);
                    ScriptEngineLoader._addedComponents.Add(contentsLayout);
                }
                
                var contentsFitter = category.Contents.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                if (contentsFitter == null)
                {
                    contentsFitter = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                    contentsFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                    contentsFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                    ScriptEngineLoader._addedComponents.Add(contentsFitter);
                }

                category.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(true);
                
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(category.Contents);
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(__instance.Content);
                
                ScriptEngineLoader._createdGameObjects.Add(category.gameObject);
                __instance.CreatedCategories.Add(category);
            }
            catch { }
        }

        private static string CondenseSlotNumbers(string input)
        {
            var parts = input.Split(new[] { ',' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
            var numbers = new List<int>();

            foreach (var part in parts)
            {
                if (int.TryParse(part.Trim(), out int num))
                    numbers.Add(num);
            }

            if (numbers.Count <= 5) return input;

            numbers.Sort();

            var ranges = new List<string>();
            int rangeStart = numbers[0];
            int rangeEnd = numbers[0];

            for (int i = 1; i < numbers.Count; i++)
            {
                if (numbers[i] == rangeEnd + 1)
                {
                    rangeEnd = numbers[i];
                }
                else
                {
                    ranges.Add(FormatRange(rangeStart, rangeEnd));
                    rangeStart = numbers[i];
                    rangeEnd = numbers[i];
                }
            }

            ranges.Add(FormatRange(rangeStart, rangeEnd));
            return string.Join(", ", ranges);
        }

        private static string FormatRange(int start, int end)
        {
            if (start == end) return start.ToString();
            if (end == start + 1) return $"{start}, {end}";
            return $"{start}-{end}";
        }
    }

    #endregion
}

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The error is happening at `ScriptEngine.ScriptEngine+<>c__DisplayClass40_2.<LoadDLL>b__1 () [0x0001b] in D:\SVN\BepInEx.Debug\src\ScriptEngine\ScriptEngine.cs:188`

This is inside ScriptEngine's code, not ours. The error happens when ScriptEngine tries to call `GameObject.AddComponent(System.Type)` with our plugin type. The NullReferenceException happens inside Unity's native code.

This could mean:
1. The Type itself is null or invalid
2. Some dependency of our type can't be loaded
3. The ModBehaviour base class is causing issues when the type system tries to resolve it

The problem is that even though `ScriptEngineLoader` inherits from `BaseUnityPlugin`, when the CLR loads the assembly, it also needs to load `StationpediaPlusMod` which inherits from `ModBehaviour`. If `ModBehaviour` or its dependencies aren't available at the time ScriptEngine tries to add the component, it could fail.

Let me try a completely different approach - put the ScriptEngineLoader in a separate file/assembly, OR make it so the StationpediaPlusMod class doesn't need ModBehaviour when loaded via ScriptEngine.

Actually, the simplest fix might be to use conditional compilation or to check if SLP is present. But that's getting complicated.

Let me look at what ScriptEngine actually does. Looking at the error, it seems like ScriptEngine:
1. Loads the DLL
2. Finds classes with [BepInPlugin] attribute
3. Tries to add them as components to a GameObject

The issue is that when it tries to add our `ScriptEngineLoader` component, something goes wrong. Even though `ScriptEngineLoader` only extends `BaseUnityPlugin`, the fact that our assembly ALSO contains `StationpediaPlusMod` which extends `ModBehaviour` could be causing the type loading to fail.
 
I'm considering creating a separate DLL to isolate ScriptEngine dependencies. The core challenge is ensuring type resolution without introducing complex runtime checks. Reflection might offer a way to make `ModBehaviour` optional, avoiding potential loading conflicts during component initialization.

The root cause appears to be a type loading issue occurring before any actual code execution. Unity's native code is throwing a NullReferenceException during the component addition process, suggesting a deeper problem with type resolution or dependency management.

My current hypothesis centers on assembly loading mechanics. When ScriptEngine attempts to load the entire assembly, any unresolved type references could potentially block the entire loading process, preventing the ScriptEngineLoader from being properly instantiated.

I'll create a dedicated, minimal DLL specifically designed for ScriptEngine interaction, which should isolate dependencies and prevent potential loading failures. This targeted approach might resolve the current initialization challenges by ensuring clean, independent assembly loading.

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The user is saying that even after copying the updated descriptions.json to the scripts folder and pressing F6, the tooltips aren't showing the updated text.

The issue is likely that the tooltip text is being cached. Looking at the code, in the tooltip components there's a `_cachedTooltipText` field that stores the tooltip text after it's first generated. So even when the descriptions.json is reloaded, the existing tooltip components still have their cached text.

Let me check the code to confirm this caching behavior and find a solution.

The solution would be to either:
1. Clear the cached tooltip text when reloading
2. Not cache the tooltip text (performance hit)
3. Destroy and recreate all tooltip components on reload

The cleanest solution is probably to clear the cache when reloading. But wait - when F6 is pressed, ScriptEngine unloads the old assembly and loads the new one. The `OnDestroy` is called on the old `ScriptEngineLoader` which cleans up `_addedComponents`. So the tooltip components should be destroyed...

But wait, looking at the current code structure, I think when InitializeFromScriptEngine is called, it might not be clearing the existing tooltips properly, OR the tooltips are being added to game objects that persist across reloads.

Actually, looking more carefully at the flow:
1. F6 pressed
2. ScriptEngine calls OnDestroy on old plugin
3. CleanupFromScriptEngine is called, which destroys _addedComponents
4. New plugin is loaded
5. InitializeFromScriptEngine is called
6. LoadDescriptionsStatic() reloads the JSON - this should have the new data
7. Monitor coroutine detects page and calls AddTooltipsToLogicItemsStatic
8. AddTooltipsToCategoryStatic checks for existing tooltip and skips if found

Ah, the problem is in step 8 - it checks `logic.GetComponent<SPDALogicTooltip>()` but we're using the static version which would check for a different component type in the ScriptEngine path vs the SLP path.
 
I'm now focusing on understanding the caching mechanism more deeply. The component seems to retain its text even after being recreated, which suggests the caching happens at a more fundamental level. Perhaps the initialization process isn't triggering a full refresh of the tooltip text, even when the component is technically new.

The cached text might be persisting through some unexpected mechanism - maybe a static field or a shared reference that isn't being properly reset during the reload process. I need to trace how the tooltip text is initially set and see if there's a way to force a complete refresh.

The core problem appears to be the ScriptEngine's reload logic. When only the JSON file changes, the system doesn't recognize it as a significant update. This means the existing cached components continue to use their original text, preventing the new descriptions from taking effect.

The proposed solutions are straightforward: either manually update the DLL timestamp, perform a quick rebuild, or modify the JSON directly in the scripts folder to trigger a proper reload. Option 3 seems the most practical - a quick rebuild ensures the DLL timestamp changes and forces a complete refresh of the components.

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The user is describing two issues:

1. When F6 is pressed, tooltips stop working until Stationpedia is closed and reopened
2. When tooltips come back, they show old (cached) values, not the edited ones

This suggests:
1. The tooltip components are being destroyed but not properly re-added after F6
2. The descriptions.json is being loaded from a cached location or the old data is being used

Let me think about what's happening:

1. F6 triggers ScriptEngine to unload the old plugin (OnDestroy is called)
2. ScriptEngine loads the new DLL
3. The new plugin's Awake() is called, which calls Initialize
4. Stationpedia.Regenerate() is called, which rebuilds the pages
5. But the tooltip components that were attached to the old UI elements are gone

The issue is that when Stationpedia regenerates, it creates NEW UI elements. The old tooltip components were attached to the OLD UI elements which are now destroyed. The monitor coroutine should detect the page change and add new tooltips...

But wait - the cached tooltip text! Each tooltip component caches its tooltip text in `_cachedTooltipText`. When we reload, we create new tooltip components, but they lookup descriptions from the freshly loaded DeviceDatabase. So that should be fine...

Unless... the issue is that:
1. Old tooltips were on the old UI elements
2. Stationpedia.Regenerate() destroys those
3. But the Stationpedia UI itself isn't re-opened, just regenerated in the background
4. The monitor coroutine checks `currentPageKey != _lastPageKey` - but if it's the same page, it won't re-add tooltips!

That's it! After F6:
- The monitor has `_lastPageKeyStatic` set to "ThingRobot" (for example)
- Stationpedia regenerates, creating new UI elements without tooltips


- The current page is still "ThingRobot"
- Monitor sees same page key, doesn't add tooltips
- User has to close/reopen to trigger page change detection

I see two critical fixes needed. First, force a page tracking reset after regeneration to ensure tooltips are re-added. Second, ensure the static DeviceDatabase is completely cleared and reloaded to prevent stale cached descriptions from persisting.

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Called by ScriptEngineLoader when mod is loaded via F6 hot-reload (no SLP instance)
        /// </summary>
        public static void InitializeFromScriptEngine(MonoBehaviour host, ManualLogSource log)
        {
            Log = log;
            _scriptEngineHost = host;
            
            Log.LogInfo("InitializeFromScriptEngine called");
            
            // FIRST: Clean up any existing tooltip components from previous loads
            // This is important because when ScriptEngine reloads, the old static lists are gone
            // but the tooltip components may still be attached to GameObjects
            Log.LogInfo("Cleaning up old tooltip components...");
            CleanupExistingTooltips();
            
            // Load descriptions
            Log.LogInfo("Loading descriptions...");
            LoadDescriptionsStatic();
            
            // Apply Harmony patches
            Log.LogInfo("Applying Harmony patches...");
            ApplyHarmonyPatchesStatic();
            
            // Reset page tracking so monitor will re-add tooltips after reload
            _lastPageKeyStatic = "";
            _stationpediaFoundStatic = false;
            
            // Regenerate Stationpedia
            Log.LogInfo($"Stationpedia.Instance = {Stationpedia.Instance}");
            if (Stationpedia.Instance != null)
            {
                Log.LogInfo(">>> REGENERATING STATIONPEDIA NOW <<<");
                try
                {
                    Stationpedia.Regenerate();
                    Log.LogInfo(">>> STATIONPEDIA REGENERATED SUCCESSFULLY <<<");
                    ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Stationpedia regenerated!");
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    Log.LogError($"Failed to regenerate Stationpedia: {ex}");
                }
            }
            else
            {
                Log.LogWarning("Stationpedia.Instance is NULL");
            }
            
            // Start monitoring coroutine on the host MonoBehaviour
            Log.LogInfo("Starting monitoring coroutine...");
            host.StartCoroutine(MonitorStationpediaCoroutineStatic());
            
            Log.LogInfo("InitializeFromScriptEngine complete!");
            ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] Initialized via ScriptEngine!");
        }
        
        /// <summary>
        /// Find and destroy any tooltip components that may exist from previous loads
        /// </summary>
        private static void CleanupExistingTooltips()
        {
            int destroyed = 0;
            
            // Find all tooltip components in the scene by type name
            // We search by type because after reload, the old types are from a different assembly
            foreach (var go in UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType<GameObject>())
            {
                var components = go.GetComponents<Component>();
                foreach (var comp in components)
                {
                    if (comp != null)
                    {
                        string typeName = comp.GetType().Name;
                        if (typeName == "SPDALogicTooltip" || 
                            typeName == "SPDASlotTooltip" ||
                            typeName == "SPDAVersionTooltip" ||
                            typeName == "SPDAMemoryTooltip" ||
                            typeName == "SELogicTooltip")
                        {
                            try
                            {
                                UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(comp);
                                destroyed++;
                            }
                            catch { }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            Log?.LogInfo($"Destroyed {destroyed} old tooltip components");
            
            // Clear our tracking lists (they may have stale references)
            _addedComponents.Clear();
            _createdGameObjects.Clear();
        }
```

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The user has three issues:

1. **Build doesn't update the JSON in the mods folder** - We're only copying to scripts folder, not the SLP mods folder
2. **JSON changes don't appear after F6** - The tooltip components cache their text in `_cachedTooltipText`, so even after reload, the old cached text is used
3. **No tooltips until closing/reopening Stationpedia after F6** - The page tracking reset isn't enough, we need to force refresh

Let me address all three:

1. For the mods folder, we need to add that to the copy command
2. For cached tooltips, we need to clear the cache or remove/recreate the tooltip components
3. For immediate tooltips, after F6 we should detect if Stationpedia is open and force add tooltips

The main issue is the caching. Looking at the SPDALogicTooltip class, it has `_cachedTooltipText` which is set once and never cleared. Even when we reset `_lastPageKeyStatic`, the existing tooltip components still have their cached text.

The solution is to destroy existing tooltip components during cleanup and let fresh ones be created with new descriptions.

```
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using BepInEx;
using BepInEx.Logging;
using HarmonyLib;
using StationeersMods.Interface;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace StationpediaPlus
{
    /// <summary>
    /// StationpediaPlus - Enhanced Stationpedia with tooltips and special behaviors
    /// Works with both SLP (via ModBehaviour) and ScriptEngine hot-reload (via BepInPlugin attribute)
    /// Per apro: BepInPlugin attribute is required for BepInEx to find the mod in the reloaded assembly
    /// </summary>
    [BepInPlugin("StationpediaPlus", "StationpediaPlus", "1.0.0")]
    public class StationpediaPlusMod : ModBehaviour
    {
        public const string HarmonyId = "com.stationpediaplus.mod";
        
        // BepInEx logger - will show in BepInEx console
        internal static ManualLogSource Log;
        
        // Static reference for tooltip component access
        public static StationpediaPlusMod Instance { get; private set; }
```

- oldString:

```
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using Assets.Scripts;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using BepInEx;
using BepInEx.Logging;
using HarmonyLib;
using StationeersMods.Interface;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace StationpediaPlus
{
    /// <summary>
    /// ScriptEngine Loader - Minimal class for F6 hot-reload via ScriptEngine.
    /// Uses delayed initialization to avoid type loading issues.
    /// </summary>
    [BepInPlugin("com.stationpediaplus.scriptengine", "StationpediaPlus_ScriptEngine", "1.0.0")]
    public class ScriptEngineLoader : BaseUnityPlugin
    {
        private ManualLogSource _log;
        private bool _initialized = false;
        
        void Awake()
        {
            _log = Logger; // Use built-in BepInEx logger
            _log.LogInfo("========================================");
            _log.LogInfo("=== ScriptEngineLoader Awake() CALLED ===");
            _log.LogInfo("========================================");
        }
        
        void Update()
        {
            // Defer initialization to Update() to avoid any type loading issues during Awake
            if (!_initialized)
            {
                _initialized = true;
                _log.LogInfo("Deferred initialization starting...");
                
                try
                {
                    DoInitialize();
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    _log.LogError($"Initialization failed: {ex}");
                }
            }
        }
        
        private void DoInitialize()
        {
            // Check if main mod is already loaded (via SLP)
            if (StationpediaPlusMod.Instance != null)
            {
                _log.LogInfo("StationpediaPlusMod.Instance exists, triggering reload...");
                StationpediaPlusMod.Instance.TriggerReload();
            }
            else
            {
                _log.LogInfo("StationpediaPlusMod.Instance is null - SLP mod not loaded");
                _log.LogInfo("Initializing directly via ScriptEngineLoader...");
                
                // Initialize directly without trying to create a ModBehaviour
                StationpediaPlusMod.InitializeFromScriptEngine(this, _log);
            }
        }
        
        void OnDestroy()
        {
            _log?.LogInfo("ScriptEngineLoader OnDestroy - cleaning up...");
            try
            {
                StationpediaPlusMod.CleanupFromScriptEngine();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                _log?.LogError($"Cleanup failed: {ex}");
            }
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// StationpediaPlus - Enhanced Stationpedia with tooltips and special behaviors
    /// Works with both SLP (via ModBehaviour) and ScriptEngine hot-reload (via ScriptEngineLoader)
    /// </summary>
    public class StationpediaPlusMod : ModBehaviour
    {
        public const string HarmonyId = "com.stationpediaplus.mod";
        
        // BepInEx logger - will show in BepInEx console
        internal static ManualLogSource Log;
        
        // Static reference for tooltip component access
        public static StationpediaPlusMod Instance { get; private set; }
```


</details></tool-use>

        // Called by Unity/BepInEx when plugin loads (works for both SLP and ScriptEngine)
        void Awake()
        {
            try
            {
                // Initialize BepInEx logger
                Log = BepInEx.Logging.Logger.CreateLogSource("StationpediaPlus");
                Log.LogInfo("========================================");
                Log.LogInfo("=== StationpediaPlusMod Awake() CALLED ===");
                Log.LogInfo("========================================");
                
                ConsoleWindow.Print("[StationpediaPlus] === Awake() ===");
                
                // Clean up any existing tooltip components from previous loads (for ScriptEngine hot-reload)
                CleanupExistingTooltips();
                
                // Reset initialization flag for hot-reload
                _initialized = false;
                
                Instance = this;
                Log.LogInfo("Calling Initialize from Awake...");
                Initialize();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Log?.LogError($"ERROR in Awake: {ex}");
                ConsoleWindow.Print($"[StationpediaPlus] ERROR in Awake: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

The user got advice from apro on Discord. The key insight is:

1. The `[BepInPlugin]` attribute needs to be on the main class, not a separate loader class
2. The class should extend `BaseUnityPlugin` (or a class that extends it, like `ModBehaviour`)
3. The initialization should happen in `Awake()` instead of `OnLoaded()`

Since `ModBehaviour` already extends `BaseUnityPlugin`, we just need to:
1. Add `[BepInPlugin]` to `StationpediaPlusMod` directly (not a separate ScriptEngineLoader class)
2. Make sure `Awake()` handles initialization

- newString:

```
        public static void ChangeDisplay_Postfix(Assets.Scripts.UI.UniversalPage __instance, StationpediaPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                string pageKey = page.Key;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(pageKey)) return;

                if (!StationpediaPlusMod.DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(pageKey, out var deviceDesc)) return;
                if (deviceDesc.specialBehaviors == null || deviceDesc.specialBehaviors.Count == 0) return;

                var categoryPrefab = Stationpedia.Instance.CategoryPrefab;
                var genericPrefab = Stationpedia.Instance.GenericPrefab;
                
                if (categoryPrefab == null || genericPrefab == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Create the collapsible category container
                StationpediaCategory category = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<StationpediaCategory>(
                    categoryPrefab, __instance.Content);
                category.Title.text = "Special Behaviors";
                StationpediaPlusMod._createdGameObjects.Add(category.gameObject);

                // Create individual items for each special behavior using GenericPrefab
                // This gives us the dark background boxes like Logic Slots has
                foreach (var behavior in deviceDesc.specialBehaviors)
                {
                    SPDAGeneric item = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<SPDAGeneric>(
                        genericPrefab, category.Contents);
                    
                    // Set the header (title) - gold color
                    if (item.Header != null)
                    {
                        item.Header.text = $"<color=#FFD700>{behavior.title}</color>";
                    }
                    
                    // Set the info (description)
                    if (item.Info != null)
                    {
                        item.Info.text = behavior.description;
                    }
                    
                    // Hide the icon if there is one
                    if (item.Icon != null)
                    {
                        item.Icon.gameObject.SetActive(false);
                    }
                    
                    StationpediaPlusMod._createdGameObjects.Add(item.gameObject);
                }

                category.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(true);
                
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(category.Contents);
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(__instance.Content);
                
                __instance.CreatedCategories.Add(category);
```

- oldString:

```
        public static void ChangeDisplay_Postfix(Assets.Scripts.UI.UniversalPage __instance, StationpediaPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                string pageKey = page.Key;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(pageKey)) return;

                if (!StationpediaPlusMod.DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(pageKey, out var deviceDesc)) return;
                if (deviceDesc.specialBehaviors == null || deviceDesc.specialBehaviors.Count == 0) return;

                var categoryPrefab = Stationpedia.Instance.CategoryPrefab;
                
                if (categoryPrefab == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                StationpediaCategory category = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<StationpediaCategory>(
                    categoryPrefab, __instance.Content);
                category.Title.text = "Special Behaviors";

                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                foreach (var behavior in deviceDesc.specialBehaviors)
                {
                    sb.AppendLine($"<color=#FFD700><b>{behavior.title}</b></color>");
                    sb.AppendLine(behavior.description);
                    sb.AppendLine();
                }

                var textGO = new UnityEngine.GameObject("SpecialBehaviorsText");
                textGO.transform.SetParent(category.Contents, false);
                StationpediaPlusMod._createdGameObjects.Add(textGO);
                
                var textComponent = textGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                textComponent.text = sb.ToString().TrimEnd();
                textComponent.fontSize = 16;
                textComponent.color = new UnityEngine.Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 0.8f, 1f);
                textComponent.enableWordWrapping = true;
                textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
                
                var rectTransform = textGO.GetComponent<UnityEngine.RectTransform>();
                rectTransform.anchorMin = new UnityEngine.Vector2(0, 1);
                rectTransform.anchorMax = new UnityEngine.Vector2(1, 1);
                rectTransform.pivot = new UnityEngine.Vector2(0.5f, 1);
                rectTransform.sizeDelta = new UnityEngine.Vector2(-20, 0);
                
                var textLayout = textGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                textLayout.preferredWidth = -1;
                textLayout.flexibleWidth = 1;
                
                var contentsLayout = category.Contents.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                if (contentsLayout == null)
                {
                    contentsLayout = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                    contentsLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                    contentsLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                    contentsLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                    contentsLayout.childControlHeight = true;
                    contentsLayout.spacing = 5;
                    contentsLayout.padding = new UnityEngine.RectOffset(10, 10, 5, 10);
                    StationpediaPlusMod._addedComponents.Add(contentsLayout);
                }
                
                var contentsFitter = category.Contents.GetComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                if (contentsFitter == null)
                {
                    contentsFitter = category.Contents.gameObject.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                    contentsFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                    contentsFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                    StationpediaPlusMod._addedComponents.Add(contentsFitter);
                }

                category.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(true);
                
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(category.Contents);
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(__instance.Content);
                
                StationpediaPlusMod._createdGameObjects.Add(category.gameObject);
                __instance.CreatedCategories.Add(category);
```


</details></tool-use>

- filePath: `c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaPlus\mod\StationpediaPlus.cs`
- newString:

```
        public static void ChangeDisplay_Postfix(Assets.Scripts.UI.UniversalPage __instance, StationpediaPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                string pageKey = page.Key;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(pageKey)) return;

                if (!StationpediaPlusMod.DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(pageKey, out var deviceDesc)) return;
                if (deviceDesc.specialBehaviors == null || deviceDesc.specialBehaviors.Count == 0) return;

                var categoryPrefab = Stationpedia.Instance.CategoryPrefab;
                
                if (categoryPrefab == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Create the collapsible category container
                StationpediaCategory category = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<StationpediaCategory>(
                    categoryPrefab, __instance.Content);
                category.Title.text = "Special Behaviors";
                StationpediaPlusMod._createdGameObjects.Add(category.gameObject);

                // Create a single container for all behaviors with dark background
                var containerGO = new UnityEngine.GameObject("SpecialBehaviorsContainer");
                containerGO.transform.SetParent(category.Contents, false);
                StationpediaPlusMod._createdGameObjects.Add(containerGO);
                
                // Add dark background image
                var containerImage = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Image>();
                containerImage.color = new UnityEngine.Color(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 0.8f);
                
                // Add layout element for proper sizing
                var containerLayout = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                containerLayout.flexibleWidth = 1;
                
                // Add content size fitter to expand based on text
                var containerFitter = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter>();
                containerFitter.horizontalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
                containerFitter.verticalFit = UnityEngine.UI.ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                // Add vertical layout for padding
                var containerVLayout = containerGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.VerticalLayoutGroup>();
                containerVLayout.padding = new UnityEngine.RectOffset(15, 15, 10, 10);
                containerVLayout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
                containerVLayout.childForceExpandHeight = false;
                containerVLayout.childControlWidth = true;
                containerVLayout.childControlHeight = true;
                
                // Build the text content
                var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder();
                bool first = true;
                foreach (var behavior in deviceDesc.specialBehaviors)
                {
                    if (!first) sb.AppendLine();
                    sb.AppendLine($"<color=#FFD700><b>{behavior.title}</b></color>");
                    sb.Append(behavior.description);
                    first = false;
                }

                // Create text object
                var textGO = new UnityEngine.GameObject("SpecialBehaviorsText");
                textGO.transform.SetParent(containerGO.transform, false);
                StationpediaPlusMod._createdGameObjects.Add(textGO);
                
                var textComponent = textGO.AddComponent<TMPro.TextMeshProUGUI>();
                textComponent.text = sb.ToString();
                textComponent.fontSize = 16;
                textComponent.color = new UnityEngine.Color(0.85f, 0.85f, 0.85f, 1f);
                textComponent.enableWordWrapping = true;
                textComponent.overflowMode = TMPro.TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
                textComponent.richText = true;
                
                // Make text expand to fit content
                var textLayout = textGO.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.LayoutElement>();
                textLayout.flexibleWidth = 1;

                category.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(true);
                
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(category.Contents);
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(__instance.Content);
                
                __instance.CreatedCategories.Add(category);
```

- oldString:

```
        public static void ChangeDisplay_Postfix(Assets.Scripts.UI.UniversalPage __instance, StationpediaPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                string pageKey = page.Key;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(pageKey)) return;

                if (!StationpediaPlusMod.DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(pageKey, out var deviceDesc)) return;
                if (deviceDesc.specialBehaviors == null || deviceDesc.specialBehaviors.Count == 0) return;

                var categoryPrefab = Stationpedia.Instance.CategoryPrefab;
                var genericPrefab = Stationpedia.Instance.GenericPrefab;
                
                if (categoryPrefab == null || genericPrefab == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Create the collapsible category container
                StationpediaCategory category = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<StationpediaCategory>(
                    categoryPrefab, __instance.Content);
                category.Title.text = "Special Behaviors";
                StationpediaPlusMod._createdGameObjects.Add(category.gameObject);

                // Create individual items for each special behavior using GenericPrefab
                // This gives us the dark background boxes like Logic Slots has
                foreach (var behavior in deviceDesc.specialBehaviors)
                {
                    SPDAGeneric item = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<SPDAGeneric>(
                        genericPrefab, category.Contents);
                    
                    // Set the header (title) - gold color
                    if (item.Header != null)
                    {
                        item.Header.text = $"<color=#FFD700>{behavior.title}</color>";
                    }
                    
                    // Set the info (description)
                    if (item.Info != null)
                    {
                        item.Info.text = behavior.description;
                    }
                    
                    // Hide the icon if there is one
                    if (item.Icon != null)
                    {
                        item.Icon.gameObject.SetActive(false);
                    }
                    
                    StationpediaPlusMod._createdGameObjects.Add(item.gameObject);
                }

                category.Contents.gameObject.SetActive(true);
                
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(category.Contents);
                UnityEngine.UI.LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(__instance.Content);
                
                __instance.CreatedCategories.Add(category);
```


</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The user is showing that the GenericPrefab boxes are all squished together and overlapping. The issue is that the GenericPrefab is probably designed for short one-line items, not multi-line descriptions.

Let me try a different approach - use just one GenericPrefab item with all the text combined, or maybe use the InfoBoxPrefab instead which might be designed for longer text.

Or we could create a single text object with proper layout settings. Let me try using the InfoBoxPrefab first since it might be designed for longer content.

Actually, looking at the screenshot more carefully, it seems like multiple items are being created but they're overlapping. The layout isn't working properly.

Let me try a simpler approach - create ONE item with all the text, or manually set up proper layout on the Contents transform.

Actually, I think the best approach might be to:
1. Use a single large text box inside the category
2. Make sure it wraps properly
3. Use ContentSizeFitter to make the box expand to fit the text

Let me go back to a simpler text-based approach but make sure the layout is correct.

The error is happening during regeneration. The issue is in the ChangeDisplay_Postfix - it's trying to access a component that doesn't exist or has been destroyed. The error trace shows:

```

```

This is happening in the patched ChangeDisplay method. The problem is that after the first reload, something is getting destroyed but we're still trying to use it. 

Looking at the code I just wrote, the issue could be in the ChangeDisplay_Postfix where we're creating new GameObjects and adding components. After an F6 reload, the prefabs or category might be in a bad state.

Let me check the current code and add null checks, particularly around the `category.Contents` which might be null after cleanup.

The key insight from the error - it's happening during `Regenerate()` which calls `ChangeDisplay`. During hot reload, the old objects are destroyed but the patch is still referencing them somehow.

I need to add more defensive null checks, especially around the category.Contents transform.

<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- filePath: `c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaPlus\mod\StationpediaPlus.cs`
- newString:

```
        public static void ChangeDisplay_Postfix(Assets.Scripts.UI.UniversalPage __instance, StationpediaPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                // Unity-safe null checks - destroyed objects are "fake null"
                if ((object)__instance == null || !__instance) return;
                if ((object)page == null) return;
                
                // Check if the Content transform is valid (not destroyed)
                UnityEngine.Transform contentTransform;
                try
                {
                    contentTransform = __instance.Content;
                    if ((object)contentTransform == null || !contentTransform) return;
                    // Try to access gameObject to verify it's not destroyed
                    var testGO = contentTransform.gameObject;
                    if ((object)testGO == null || !testGO) return;
                }
                catch
                {
                    return; // Content is destroyed
                }
                
                string pageKey = page.Key;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(pageKey)) return;

                if (!StationpediaPlusMod.DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(pageKey, out var deviceDesc)) return;
                if (deviceDesc.specialBehaviors == null || deviceDesc.specialBehaviors.Count == 0) return;

                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if ((object)stationpedia == null || !stationpedia) return;
                
                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                
                if ((object)categoryPrefab == null || !categoryPrefab)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Create the collapsible category container
                StationpediaCategory category = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<StationpediaCategory>(
                    categoryPrefab, contentTransform);
                if ((object)category == null || !category) return;
                if ((object)category.Title == null || !category.Title) return;
                if ((object)category.Contents == null || !category.Contents) return;
                
                category.Title.text = "Special Behaviors";
```

- oldString:

```
        public static void ChangeDisplay_Postfix(Assets.Scripts.UI.UniversalPage __instance, StationpediaPage page)
        {
            try
            {
                // Early null checks for hot-reload safety
                if (__instance == null || page == null) return;
                if (__instance.Content == null) return;
                
                string pageKey = page.Key;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(pageKey)) return;

                if (!StationpediaPlusMod.DeviceDatabase.TryGetValue(pageKey, out var deviceDesc)) return;
                if (deviceDesc.specialBehaviors == null || deviceDesc.specialBehaviors.Count == 0) return;

                var stationpedia = Stationpedia.Instance;
                if (stationpedia == null) return;
                
                var categoryPrefab = stationpedia.CategoryPrefab;
                
                if (categoryPrefab == null)
                {
                    return;
                }

                // Create the collapsible category container
                StationpediaCategory category = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate<StationpediaCategory>(
                    categoryPrefab, __instance.Content);
                if (category == null || category.Title == null || category.Contents == null) return;
                
                category.Title.text = "Special Behaviors";
```


</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The error is still happening. The issue is that the null check I added is happening inside the Postfix, but the error is occurring at `Component.get_gameObject` which is a native Unity call. This suggests that the `__instance` object itself is a destroyed Unity object - the C# reference exists but the underlying Unity native object has been destroyed.

In Unity, when you destroy a GameObject, C# references to it aren't nullified - they become "fake null" where `== null` returns true but the reference itself isn't actually null. The standard null check `__instance == null` might not work correctly for destroyed Unity objects.

I need to use Unity's proper null check pattern: `__instance == null` or better yet, use the implicit bool conversion.

Let me update the code to use Unity-safe null checking:

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The error is happening in the **original** `ChangeDisplay` method, not our postfix. The Stationpedia's internal state has references to destroyed Unity objects from before our cleanup. The safest fix is to skip the `Regenerate()` call on hot-reload - pages will update naturally when viewed. 

The problem is that `Regenerate()` fails after hot-reload because Stationpedia's internal state has destroyed object references. The error is caught but continues to cause problems. Let me skip regeneration on reload and add a flag to detect it:
</details></think>
